hero.subheadline: Farmsy connects you with verified farms across the Netherlands and Belgium. From farm shops to organic producers — discover, connect, and support local agriculture.
hero.launchingSoon: Be among the first to experience Farmsy. Launching soon.

subscribe.consent: I'd like to receive updates from Farmsy.
subscribe.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch soon.
subscribe.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
subscribe.errorConsent: Please accept the consent to continue.

findFarms.title: Find local farms
findFarms.desc: Discover verified farms in your region. Search by location, type, or organic certification.

verified.title: Verified & trusted
verified.desc: Every farm is verified. SKAL-certified organic farms are clearly marked for transparency.

connect.title: Connect directly
connect.desc: View farm products, opening hours, and connect directly with the people behind your food.

available.title: Always available
available.desc: Web and mobile. Find local farms wherever you are, whenever you need them.

cta.subtext: Join the pre-launch list. No spam — just one email when Farmsy goes live.
